title: pacemaker bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[3.0.1-3.1.0.1]
- Replace bug url [Orabug: 34202300]
- Upstream reference in pacemaker crm_report binary [Orabug: 32825154]

[3.0.1-3.1]
- Fix a race condition between daemons when erasing transient attrs
- Resolves: RHEL-135091
full_text:
[3.0.1-3.1.0.1]
- Replace bug url [Orabug: 34202300]
- Upstream reference in pacemaker crm_report binary [Orabug: 32825154]

[3.0.1-3.1]
- Fix a race condition between daemons when erasing transient attrs
- Resolves: RHEL-135091
